intro: The broken hull of an old ship rests on the seabed, its cargo strewn across the silt.
title: The Sunken Vessel
description: Charts and crates spill from the wreck. Scout the navigator's quarters to map the routes ahead and salvage a scrap of an old treasure chart, or drift on past.

1.label: Scout the wreck
1.tooltip:
(+) Reveal the onward routes onto your World Map
(+) Salvage a Treasure-Map Fragment
1.selected: You slip into the flooded hull and sift through the navigator's scattered charts...

2.label: Drift on
2.selected: You leave the wreck to the silt and the current.

scouted: The wreck's charts map the routes ahead, and you salvage a Treasure-Map Fragment. (Press M to view.)
